meta.title: AoD Podcast | To Avoid Great Power Conflict with China, American Industry Needs To "Win the Decade"
meta.description: Jonathan Ward, senior fellow at Hudson Institute, joins Marshall Kosloff to discuss the economic threats of the Chinese Communist Party, arguing that now is the time to build up America’s industrial base, and that private industry and US political leaders needs to unite to defeat the CCP economically—or risk losing the decade to China and presaging future conflict.
